Google Gemma 4B: Private Offline AI Translation in Your Browser

Google just released Translate Gemma 4B, a powerful new AI model that runs 55 languages entirely within your browser without an internet connection. This update represents a massive shift toward local AI, prioritizing user privacy and lightning-fast performance without cloud servers.

00:00 - Intro: Google's New AI Model
00:49 - The End of Cloud-Based Translation
01:41 - Gemma 4B vs. 12B and 27B Models
02:32 - WebGPU and Browser Speed
03:11 - Real-World Offline Use Cases
04:24 - Translating Text Inside Images
04:56 - How Google Trained Gemma 4B
05:48 - The Rise of Local AI Trends
